data.title: Authentication Security
data.description: Mechanisms to secure user accounts and authentication processes.

data.title: Encryption Practices
data.description: Data encryption both at rest and in transit for user privacy.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest

data.title: Anomaly Detection
data.description: Monitoring unusual activity to prevent security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Machine Learning algorithms for anomaly detection

data.title: Data Leakage Prevention
data.description: Strategies to prevent unauthorized access to sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Access control lists, segmentation, and logging

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular scanning and patching to mitigate security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated testing and patch management systems
